skills.name: rui
skills.description: Story-driven SDLC orchestrator — thin router that delegates to sub-skills. Command: /rui.

skills.name: rui-analysis
skills.description: Code and architecture static analysis — complexity, coupling, file bloat, dependency health, architecture boundary detection. Command: /rui-analysis.

skills.name: rui-claude
skills.description: Manage ALL .claude/ directories across the repo — sync from remote, analyze health, and recommend tasks.

skills.name: rui-code
skills.description: Source code implementation pipeline — sole entry point for code changes with Gate A/B, per-module P0 clearing, and self-improvement. Command: /rui-code.

skills.name: rui-doc
skills.description: Markdown document baseline generation — requirements to story documents with 3 modes (default, --from-code, --from-local). Command: /rui-doc.

skills.name: rui-html
skills.description: Generate or update the 7 standard HTML documents for each scene in a story directory. Command: /rui-html. Executable: node skills/rui-html/rui-html.mjs [options].

skills.name: rui-init
skills.description: Project initialization for the rui SDLC system — detect, explore, generate, architect, setup, verify, trigger. Command: /rui-init.

skills.name: rui-npm
skills.description: Manage personal npm packages — search, install, update, list, info, uninstall, publish local files/directories, and run via npx. Command: /rui-npm. Executable: node skills/rui-npm/rui-npm.mjs [command].

skills.name: rui-plan
skills.description: Generate implementation plans from story document baselines — the bridge between doc and code. Command: /rui-plan.

skills.name: rui-reporter
skills.description: Process reporting and knowledge curation — produce evidence-based reports, cross-reference story documents, curate knowledge. Command: /rui-reporter.

skills.name: rui-skills
skills.description: Discover and install Claude/Agent skill packages from the open ecosystem. Command: /rui-skills.

skills.name: rui-story
skills.description: Story panel management and sync. Manage stories under docs/故事任务面板/. Command: /rui-story. Executable: node skills/rui-story/rui-story.mjs [command].

skills.name: rui-update
skills.description: Incremental story updates with automatic T1/T2/T3 pipeline tailoring. Command: /rui-update.

skills.name: rui-version
skills.description: Semantic version management — autonomous bump determination, file sync, git commit, push, and story version rollback. Command: /rui-version.

skills.name: rui-yry
skills.description: Autonomous self-improvement loop — scan all stories, diagnose, implement, verify, version-bump, repeat until no improvement space. Command: /rui-yry.

agents.name: architect
agents.description: System architecture designer — designs system-level architecture, evaluates trade-offs, creates ADRs

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.description: Code quality reviewer — reviews code for correctness, patterns, anti-patterns, simplification opportunities. Read-only.

agents.name: coder
agents.description: Implements code following design docs, with module-by-module review and P0 enforcement

agents.name: data
agents.description: Data — 数据模型设计、迁移规划、schema 验证、数据完整性

agents.name: devops
agents.description: DevOps — 部署管线、环境管理、CI/CD 配置、监控设置

agents.name: knowledge-curator
agents.description: Knowledge Curator — 知识图谱生命周期管理、一致性验证、跨故事关联

agents.name: planner
agents.description: Implementation planner — creates bite-sized execution plans from story documents, reviews plan quality, and hands off to coder for execution

agents.name: pm
agents.description: Product decision maker — decides what to do and what not to do, delegates to sub-project PMs

agents.name: reporter
agents.description: Produces process reports and curates knowledge with evidence-based standards. User-invocable via /rui-reporter.

agents.name: reverse-engineer
agents.description: Reverse Engineer — 从源码逆向生成文档基线 (--from-code 模式)

agents.name: security
agents.description: Security expert — threat modeling, constraint enforcement, and security task injection

agents.name: self-improve
agents.description: Self-improvement pipeline — data-driven proposals, effect evaluation, and retrospective reports

agents.name: tester
agents.description: Ensures quality with test-first approach, acceptance criteria, and gate enforcement

agents.name: ux
agents.description: UX — 无障碍验证 (WCAG 2.2)、交互状态覆盖、设计一致性

stories.name: rui-npm
scenes: 场景-2-包安装与版本管理
场景-4-包信息审计与卸载

stories.name: yry-arch
scenes: 场景-5-信任边界与安全面

stories.name: yry-cdn
scenes: 场景-1-cdn资源加载与页面渲染
场景-5-npm包发布与版本管理

stories.name: yry-self-improve
scenes: 场景-5-经验技能化与记忆注入

stories.name: yry-self-test
scenes: 场景-3-文档代码一致性校验
场景-5-跨故事集成回归自检
场景-6-第三方框架与服务自检
